metadata.title: KostKu - Kost Management
metadata.description: The best boarding house management app in Indonesia

landing.heroDescription: The most complete kost management platform in Indonesia. Manage rooms, tenants, payments, and financial reports in one app.
landing.feature1Desc: Manage rooms and facilities with ease
landing.feature2Desc: Accept payments via Midtrans & manual transfer
landing.feature3Desc: Monitor income and expenses in real-time
landing.feature4Desc: Access for owners, admins, and tenants
